fields_kept: all 12 dataset fields per selected row (word, sense def/syn, examples, ambig_examples needed for the Baartmans substitutability review; the dataset's own reference explication kept for provenance only - NEVER shown on the blinded review sheet)
note: comparison arm remains the PUBLISHED point estimate per the frozen g9 record (re-basing deferred, P7 RT-16, GNG-0 accepted-as-documented); this selection only fixes the concept population our authoring is scored on to the same population the published number was computed on
selection_recipe: the 149-row test split of the published DeepNSM dataset, rows sorted ascending by integer 'id', then random.Random(0).sample(rows, 50) (CPython Mersenne-Twister, seed 0 = the frozen g9 seed), result re-sorted by 'id'
source_dataset: huggingface datasets-server rows API, dataset=baartmar/nsm_dataset (the DeepNSM paper's dataset artifact; arXiv:2505.11764), config=default, split=test, fetched 2026-07-10
